Welcome to Architise

Map how your organisation works — who does what, which systems are involved, and how everything connects. No technical background needed.

🗂
Business Systems START HERE

Define your IT landscape — apps, systems, departments and roles. This becomes the foundation for every ArchiMate and Swimlane diagram you build.

☰ Swimlane Easy start

Draw process flows as swimlane diagrams — who does what, in what order, using which system.

⬡ ArchiMate Full model

Build a structured architecture model with business, application and technology layers — export to Archi.

📋 Start from a Template

Choose a ready-made model to get started quickly. Loading a template will replace your current model — save your work first if needed.

Templates are starting points — rename, add, or delete any element after loading.

🔗 Share Model

Anyone with this link can view a read-only snapshot of your model. The full model is encoded in the URL — no server required.

The link encodes your current model. If you update the model, generate a new link.

Confirm

⚙ Settings
AI Provider

API key for Anthropic Claude. Get one at console.anthropic.com. Sent directly to Anthropic — never stored on any server.

API key for OpenAI GPT-4o mini. Get one at platform.openai.com. Sent directly to OpenAI — never stored on any server.

Keys are saved per browser profile. Clear browser data to remove them.

🪄 Guided Start

Answer four quick questions and the engine will create a working architecture model you can refine.

🔍
Start typing to search…
↑↓ navigate · Enter select · Esc close · ⌘K toggle
📐 Views

Create named views to control which elements appear in each diagram when exporting to Archi. If no views are defined, a single "Default View" with all elements is exported.

Example
◈ Viewpoints — click a viewpoint to create a named view pre-filled with matching elements
Select a view to manage its elements.
Name for the new view:
📜 Version History

Snapshots capture the full state of your model. Max 10 snapshots are kept — oldest are removed automatically.

⟳ Generate Flow from Architecture

Auto-generate a swimlane diagram by tracing relationships across your architecture layers. Actors and Roles become lanes; Processes and Services become steps; Triggering / Flow / Serving relationships become connections.

Include layers
Business Layer
Actors, Roles, Processes, Functions (always included)
Application Layer
Components, Services, Functions
Technology Layer
Infrastructure nodes, System Services
Element info
📖 Narrative View

A plain-language description of your architecture model — what happens, who does it, and which systems are involved.

No processable elements found. Add Business Processes, Actors, or Application Components to your model.
🌐 Platform beheren

Beheer welke processen en views zichtbaar zijn in het HTML-platform, stel de introductietekst in en exporteer.

Instellingen
Processen
Geen processen in dit model.
Views
Geen views in dit model.
